generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring oscillation angle of hoist during movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring wind speed for crane stability assessment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle data with high temporal resolution"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data for environmental impact assessment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service generates movement trajectories that are executed by the Control Application via the Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system employs continuous synchronization via a Python Logging Application that records the gantry crane's state in real-time to a database and a Continuous Validation Service that compares sensor measurements to ensure data integrity and temporal consistency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment in an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares real-time measurements of executed trajectories with simulation outputs using distance metrics against an acceptable threshold."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT protocol using an MQTT Broker. The Physical Crane Interface connects to the crane controllers using a Python program. No specific network topology, bandwidth, or latency details are provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The entire system is deployed on a single on-premise personal computer, with TimescaleDB (database), Eclipse Mosquitto (MQTT broker), and Grafana (dashboard) containerized using Docker. All services run within the same host environment, leveraging Docker for isolation and resource management. No cloud or edge deployment is used, and scalability is constrained by the host machine's resources."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The system integrates with external components using MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto as the message broker for real-time data exchange between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane employs the C4 Model for software architecture visualization, adhering to its standardized context and container diagram specifications, but adopts an ad-hoc approach without compliance to specific digital twin industry standards."
]
